display.name: suksma + aderrasi martin raron geiss - are you mad at me
display.author: suksma + aderrasi martin raron geiss

annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist, sparse preset consisting of a single tiny custom wave or shape at the screen center that flickers and changes color on audio transients. The surrounding field is completely black with no frame feedback or warp field active. The central element's color rotates through a hue cycle driven by the test signal's high-frequency peaks.

compatibility.note: capture was thin (202320 bytes); below the 500KB threshold — likely butterchurn compatibility gap
